englishDefinitions: (idiomatic, colloquial) Used to express frustration, exasperation, or annoyance.
persianTranslation: (اصطلاحاً، محاوره ای) برای بیان ناامیدی، عصبانیت یا آزار استفاده می شود.
examples: Oh, for crying out loud, get off the computer! You've been on there for ages!
synonyms: for the love of all that is holy
